'''yahasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chafer|chafer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chafer|chafer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yahasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæhæsæth|yæhæsæth]] || [[word:yæhæsæj|yæhæsæj]] || [[word:yæhæsæsh|yæhæsæsh]] || [[word:yæhæsæ|yæhæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahahasath|yahahasath]] || [[word:yahahasaj|yahahasaj]] || [[word:yahahasash|yahahasash]] || [[word:yahahasa|yahahasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahasath|yahasath]] || [[word:yahasaj|yahasaj]] || [[word:yahasash|yahasash]] || [[word:yahasa|yahasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahafsath|yahafsath]] || [[word:yahafsaj|yahafsaj]] || [[word:yahafsash|yahafsash]] || [[word:yahafsaf|yahafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yahasatha|yahasatha]] || [[word:yahasaja|yahasaja]] || [[word:yahasasha|yahasasha]] || [[word:yahasaka|yahasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yahasath|yahasath]] || [[word:yahasaj|yahasaj]] || [[word:yahasash|yahasash]] || [[word:yahasa|yahasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yahasathal|yahasathal]] || [[word:yahasajal|yahasajal]] || [[word:yahasashal|yahasashal]] || [[word:yahasakal|yahasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yahasathatha|yahasathatha]] || [[word:yahasajaja|yahasajaja]] || [[word:yahasashasha|yahasashasha]] || [[word:yahasaka|yahasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yahasathan|yahasathan]] || [[word:yahasajan|yahasajan]] || [[word:yahasashan|yahasashan]] || [[word:yahasakan|yahasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yahasathaoro|yahasathaoro]] || [[word:yahasajaoro|yahasajaoro]] || [[word:yahasashaoro|yahasashaoro]] || [[word:yahasakaoro|yahasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
